label: The image of an old man sitting on the stone rim of the well with a weathered face parallels earlier descriptions of ancient, weathered figures symbolizing endurance and the passage of time.
subject_name: This echoes descriptions of other ancient figures in the narrative who embody the weight of history and endurance, such as the man resting near ancient stones in chapter 5.
evidence_text: An old man sat on the stone rim of the well, his face weathered to the color and texture of old leather.

evidence.quote: An old man sat on the stone rim of the well, his face weathered to the color and texture of old leather.

interpretation: The image of an old man sitting on the stone rim of the well with a weathered face parallels earlier descriptions of ancient, weathered figures symbolizing endurance and the passage of time.
